metadata.description: Zero-manual-work E2E test generator for any stack — pytest + Selenium, discovered from the code via static analysis.

plugins.name: e2e-tester
plugins.description: /e2e-init (guided setup) + /e2e-audit (full automatic audit: basic, SEO, security, a11y, performance, responsive). Session-scoped browsers, Page Object Model, auto-installing bootstrap, enriched HTML report.
